## Rollout Objective

## Release Scope
- [ ] Shell
- [ ] Provider/state
- [ ] Primitive
- [ ] Surface
- [ ] Adapter
- [ ] Route wrapper
- [ ] Flagged rollout

## Safety Rules
- [ ] No local finance calculations
- [ ] No canonical drift
- [ ] No mixed semantic + visual PRs
- [ ] Old routes preserved until migration is complete
- [ ] Rollback is documented

## Validation
- [ ] Staging signoff
- [ ] Production signoff
- [ ] Monitoring plan
